target_profile.intended_use: Internal scientific review with explicit governance and limitation tracking.
notes: Allows compatibility harnesses and draft-aware governance snapshots.
Downgrades to review_required when submission gating or active errata require human judgment.

model_governance.dataset_basis: Public compatibility harness using Dietary MCP contracts plus governed public metadata
required_disclaimers: No claim of official PRIMo engine equivalence, proprietary dataset reproduction, or regulatory endorsement is implied.
EFSA PRIMo adapter outputs are for internal review or consultation-oriented compatibility checks only.

source_governance.title: Dietary MCP provisional food vocabulary crosswalk pack
notes: Illustrative provisional crosswalk from current Dietary MCP canonical commodities to FoodEx2-like, RPC-like, and RPCD-like identifiers.
Codes in this pack are not official EFSA FoodEx2 or RPC/RPCD identifiers and are published for workflow-hardening and field-shape validation only.

source_governance.title: Illustrative EU child dietary screening profile
notes: Illustrative curated child screening profile distributed with Dietary MCP defaults.
Expanded illustrative screening pack covers thirteen canonical commodity codes.
Use reviewed regional survey packs for regulator-facing decisions.
Project-maintained illustrative placeholder; not an externally governed survey pack.

source_governance.title: Dietary MCP commodity taxonomy entry for apples
notes: Governed taxonomy provenance entry for apples.

source_governance.title: Dietary MCP commodity taxonomy entry for milk
notes: Governed taxonomy provenance entry for milk.

source_governance.title: EFSA harmonised default values for risk assessment
notes: Notes that 60 kg has commonly been used for worldwide adult populations, while 70 kg is more realistic for EU adults when actual EU data are absent.

source_governance.title: EFSA PRIMo pesticide residue intake model tools page
notes: Used as model-family metadata for PRIMo-aligned adapter boundaries.
EFSA notes that PRIMo revision 3.1 remains the current version for MRL applications until formal endorsement of revision 4 in 2026.

source_governance.title: EFSA PRIMo revision 4 technical report
notes: Technical report describing PRIMo revision 4 public rollout and migration context.
Useful for governance and consultation-only review, but not itself the submission engine.

applied_rules.message: Applicable governance snapshots are present on the dossier.

No dossier-carried legal-limit support reviews apply to this workflow.
No deprecated governance state blocks the selected readiness profile.

required_disclaimers: No claim of official PRIMo engine equivalence, proprietary dataset reproduction, or regulatory endorsement is implied.
EFSA PRIMo adapter outputs are for internal review or consultation-oriented compatibility checks only.
notes: Readiness evaluation uses a fixed Phase 1 ruleset rather than a generic policy DSL.
Assessment combines governance checks with explicit scientific-integrity gates and does not imply final regulatory acceptance.
